title: vandellia brachiata
intro: Vandellia brachiata, also known as 'blood root', is a plant species belonging to the family Loasaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being used as a purgative and astringent to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Vandellia brachiata include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
